source.description: Backdated launch lesson raster sketch rebuilt from a generated mushroom master.
source.notes: The step frames keep the same cap, stem, spots, folds, and rosy shading path as the finished image.

process_strategy: Use the oval cap and rounded stem as fixed construction, then progressively define the dome, flare the stem, place spots and folds, and finish with restrained rosy shading.

final_elements.name: wide cap placement
final_elements.description: The broad oval placement for the mushroom cap.

final_elements.name: centered stem placement
final_elements.description: The tall rounded stem block under the cap.

final_elements.name: rounded cap silhouette
final_elements.description: The dark dome contour of the mushroom cap.

final_elements.name: lower cap curve
final_elements.description: The shallow underside curve across the cap.

final_elements.name: flared stem and base
final_elements.description: The outward stem sides and low ground mound.

final_elements.name: cap spots
final_elements.description: The uneven oval spots on the cap.

final_elements.name: underside folds
final_elements.description: The short fold marks under the cap edge.

final_elements.name: stem marks
final_elements.description: The light curved marks across the stem.

frames.visible_job: Places the wide cap oval, tall rounded stem block, and center guides before any dark contour is chosen.
Turns the guide oval into the finished broad dome and shallow lower cap curve.
Adds the outward-curving stem sides, base mound, and cap overlap that support the final mushroom.
Places the cap spots, short underside folds, and stem marks before the final color is applied.

final_step.visible_job: Darkens the selected contour and adds loose pink cap shading while preserving the cap, stem, spots, and folds.

rejection_checks: The cap spots must not appear before the spots-and-folds step.
The stem must keep the same flare and base mound in the final.
The final cap color should stay patchy enough to feel hand-sketched.
Do not replace the rounded cap silhouette with a flatter toadstool shape.
